sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Van leh lei piangsak Pasian, Ni leh kha piang sak
Pasian, Ka nuntak na a hong bawl ka Pasian,
Nitaang leh guahtui hongpia, tuk ciangin an hongla sak,
Na vangliatna kong phat hi ka Pasian,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa aw ka lungdam hi, nisim nong lungdam sak hi,
Ka hin lai teng namin kaphat den ding,
Tumging tawh nang kong phat ding,
Lam na tawh nang kong phat ding,
Hallelujah na minthang den ta hen.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tu ni in kei a dingin hunhoih hun nuam hong ki pia,
Topa' tung'h lungdamna ka ko ding hi,
Lungdamkoh biakna pia in Topa ka pahtawi ding hi.
Ka hatna teng tawh a min kaphat ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khat vei vei neekding neilo, khat vei veei silhding nei lo.
Ahi zong Topa hoihna kaphawk hi,
Van a leng vasa te leh gamlak unok paak te in,
Ka nunna nisim in tha hongdim zel.
